figures.caption: Figure 1. Overview of our training-free pipeline for the PVUW MeViS-Text challenge. Stage 1 uses Gemini-3.1 Pro to decompose each target event into instance-level grounding targets, select the clearest frame, and generate a discriminative description. Stage 2 uses SAM3agent to generate seed masks on the selected frames and propagates them through the video with the SAM3 tracker. Stage 3 further refines ambiguous or semantically inconsistent predictions through mask inspection, description regeneration, and behavior-level verification.

Figure 2. Qualitative visualization of our method on the MeViS-Text track. The figure shows representative frames together with the predicted masks, as well as an example of discriminative description generation and SAM3-agent grounding.
